subject: An elemental drake composed of crackling lightning and storm clouds, surging forward through a turbulent sky
description: A serpentine drake formed from storm clouds and arcing electricity emerges from a churning sky. Its body is a fluid mass of grey-blue vapor laced with bright white-blue bolts of lightning that define wings, neck, and gaping jaws. The creature's form is semi-translucent, dissolving into the cloud bank behind it. The palette is dominated by cool blues, slate greys, and luminous white highlights where lightning forks. The composition is a dynamic mid-shot with the drake lunging diagonally across the frame, set against a roiling, overcast atmosphere.
foreground: lightning-formed drake mid-lunge, jaws open, electrical wings spread
background: turbulent storm clouds and overcast sky
